edge_visual_hint: This offset changes only how the arc is drawn in this browser.
historical_tick_readonly: Editing is disabled while viewing a past tick.
no_results_yet: No run results yet. Run the simulation for several steps.
runtime_genome_readonly: This is a runtime genome from a simulation. It can be viewed, but cannot be edited or deleted.
default_active_hint: When enabled, the gene works all the time and skips the activation threshold.

default.description: The gene effect changes an agent trait or behavior.
default.threshold: The threshold defines when the gene becomes active.
default.weight: Strength controls how visible the active gene's influence is.

MAX_HP.threshold: This gene is treated as baseline physiology and is always active unless simulation logic disables it. The threshold is not used right now.
MAX_HP.weight: Multiplier for maximum health. For example, 1.2 increases max hp by 20%.

STRENGTH.description: Changes the agent's strength in hunting and conflicts.
STRENGTH.threshold: This gene is treated as baseline physiology and is always active unless simulation logic disables it. The threshold is not used right now.
STRENGTH.weight: Multiplier for base strength. Values below 1 weaken it, values above 1 strengthen it.

DEFENSE.description: Changes the agent's defense and reduces received damage.
DEFENSE.threshold: This gene is treated as baseline physiology and is always active unless simulation logic disables it. The threshold is not used right now.
DEFENSE.weight: Multiplier for base defense. Values below 1 weaken it, values above 1 strengthen it.

METABOLISM.description: Changes action costs and energy spending.
METABOLISM.threshold: This gene is treated as baseline physiology and is always active unless simulation logic disables it. The threshold is not used right now.
METABOLISM.weight: Multiplier for metabolism. Higher values make actions more expensive.

HUNGER_DRIVE.description: Increases the drive to seek and consume food.
HUNGER_DRIVE.threshold: The gene activates when the agent's hunger is greater than or equal to this value.
HUNGER_DRIVE.weight: Higher strength makes eating more attractive and feel cheaper.

DISPERSAL_DRIVE.description: Increases the drive to leave the current territory.
DISPERSAL_DRIVE.threshold: The gene activates on low satisfaction, high local density, or strong temperature discomfort.
DISPERSAL_DRIVE.weight: Higher strength makes movement more attractive and feel cheaper.

SITE_FIDELITY.description: Increases the drive to stay on the current territory.
SITE_FIDELITY.threshold: The gene activates when satisfaction is at least this value and the temperature is comfortable enough.
SITE_FIDELITY.weight: Higher strength makes staying and resting more attractive.

REPRODUCTION_DRIVE.threshold: The gene activates when the agent is not pregnant and satisfaction is greater than or equal to this value.
REPRODUCTION_DRIVE.weight: Higher strength makes mating more attractive and feel cheaper.

HEAT_RESISTANCE.description: Helps the agent tolerate hot territories.
HEAT_RESISTANCE.threshold: The gene activates when the current territory temperature is greater than or equal to this value.
HEAT_RESISTANCE.weight: Strength controls how much the gene reduces heat penalties.

COLD_RESISTANCE.description: Helps the agent tolerate cold territories.
COLD_RESISTANCE.threshold: The gene activates when the current territory temperature is less than or equal to this value.
COLD_RESISTANCE.weight: Strength controls how much the gene reduces cold penalties.

AGGRESSION_DRIVE.description: Increases the drive to fight for resources.
AGGRESSION_DRIVE.threshold: The gene activates when hunger or local density is greater than or equal to this value.
AGGRESSION_DRIVE.weight: Higher strength makes aggressive actions more attractive.

PREDATION_DRIVE.threshold: The gene activates when hunger is at least this value and other agents are nearby.
PREDATION_DRIVE.weight: Higher strength makes hunting more attractive and feel cheaper.

CARNIVORE_DIGESTION.description: Improves the benefit from successful hunting.
CARNIVORE_DIGESTION.threshold: The gene activates when the agent's hunger is greater than or equal to this value.
CARNIVORE_DIGESTION.weight: Higher strength increases the benefit gained from prey.

CANNIBAL_TOLERANCE.description: Increases willingness to attack genetically similar agents.
CANNIBAL_TOLERANCE.threshold: The gene activates when hunger is at least this value and other agents are nearby.
CANNIBAL_TOLERANCE.weight: Higher strength makes genetic similarity less protective against attacks.

SOCIAL_TOLERANCE.description: Helps the agent tolerate many agents on one territory.
SOCIAL_TOLERANCE.threshold: The gene activates when the number of agents on the current territory is greater than or equal to this value.
SOCIAL_TOLERANCE.weight: Strength controls how tolerant the agent is to population density.

MUTATION_RATE.description: Changes the probability of genome mutations in offspring.
MUTATION_RATE.threshold: This gene is treated as a baseline genome property and is always active. The threshold is not used right now.
MUTATION_RATE.weight: Multiplier for mutation probabilities. 1 keeps the base level, 1.5 raises it by 50%, 0.5 halves it.

no_step_result: No step results yet. Press “Step” or “Run”.
not_enough_metrics_history: At least two ticks are needed to draw charts.
no_decisions: There are no agent decisions for this step.
scenario_presets_hint: Create a personal simulation copy with territories, agents, and protected genome templates.
template_genome_readonly: This is a genome template. It can be used in simulations, but cannot be edited or deleted.

balanced_grazer.name: Baseline grazer
balanced_grazer.description: Genome with moderate survival, defense, foraging, reproduction, and social-stability parameters for control simulations.

heat_migrant.name: Heat-tolerant migrant
heat_migrant.description: Genome with increased heat tolerance and a stronger tendency to move between territories when local conditions degrade.

cold_social.name: Cold-tolerant social agent
cold_social.description: Genome for cold territories with increased tolerance to low temperatures and high population density.

predator.name: Predator
predator.description: Genome with elevated strength, hunting, aggression, and prey-digestion parameters for resource-pressure scenarios.

mutable_pioneer.name: Agent with elevated variability
mutable_pioneer.description: Genome with increased mutation probability, dispersal tendency, and accelerated reproduction in unstable environments.

baseline_mosaic.name: Baseline
baseline_mosaic.description: Simulation with 4 territories in a moderate temperature range and agents of two genomes: baseline grazer and predator.

climate_gradient.name: Climate gradient
climate_gradient.description: Simulation with 4 territories arranged along a temperature gradient and agents of three genomes: cold-tolerant social, baseline grazer, and heat-tolerant migrant.

predator_prey.name: Predator-prey
predator_prey.description: Simulation with 4 territories, increased food availability for prey, and agents of three genomes: baseline grazer, cold-tolerant social agent, and predator.

overcrowding.name: Overcrowding
overcrowding.description: Simulation with 5 territories, one resource-rich central zone, and agents of three genomes: cold-tolerant social, heat-tolerant migrant, and baseline grazer.

mutation_bottleneck.name: Mutation bottleneck
mutation_bottleneck.description: Simulation with 4 territories, limited food availability, and agents of two genomes: agent with elevated variability and baseline grazer.
